name: Yaser Zarifi
tagline: I design systems people live in — cities and software.
bio: I work at the intersection of two disciplines that are usually kept apart: I'm a full-stack developer and an architect / urban planner. To me they are the same practice at different scales — both are about designing systems that people inhabit.

On the software side I build end-to-end web products with React, Next.js and Python. On the built-environment side I work on urban analysis, masterplanning and computational design — increasingly with tools I write myself.
